case_title: VENITTA LOGAN VS. CHIPMAN RELOCATION & LOGISTICS

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,000.00 FILED BY LOGAN, VENITTA AS TO DEFENDANT CHIPMAN RELOCATION & LOGISTICS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-28-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED NOV-13-2018, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CHIPMAN RELOCATION & LOGISTICS

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-28-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-28-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. PLAINTIFF VENITTA LOGAN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CHIPMAN RELOCATION & LOGISTICS IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY EDWARD MELTON, VP. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF LOGAN, VENITTA AS TO DEFENDANT CHIPMAN RELOCATION & LOGISTICS
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED APR-02-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS. FILED BY DEFENDANT CHIPMAN RELOCATION & LOGISTICS

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF LOGAN, VENITTA ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-28-2018 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LOGAN, VENITTA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CHIPMAN RELOCATION & LOGISTICS DEFENDANT'S INVENTORY CONTROL FORM SHOWS DELIVERY OF ITEMS THAT PLAINTIFF SIGNED FOR, AND PLAINTIFF PROVIDES NO EVIDENCE THAT SHE SUBMITTED A CLAIM FORM WITHIN 30 DAYS EVEN FOR THE ITEMS SHE TESTIFIED THAT SHE IMMEDIATELY BELIEVED WERE MISSING. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
